hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo "$file" | grep -qE '^(apps/api|apps/app)/'; then echo 'TypeScript file modified — remember to run typecheck before committing'; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -q 'packages/db/prisma/generated'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not write to generated Prisma files' && exit 1; fi
